properties.name: Råttuvarri
properties.subtitle: Nordic pollen and paleoecology sites
properties.description: The site is a small lake on a pine forest-clad bedrock hill in the valley of Skibottsdalen, about 5 km inland from Lyngenfjorden. It lies a couple of km inside the Skibotn end moraines and ice margin deltas, about 20 m above the marine limit.

properties.name: Trollvatnet
properties.subtitle: Nordic pollen and paleoecology sites
properties.description: The lake is situated on a bedrock hill in the Alta valley sorne 10 km inland from the fiord head. The surroundinj vegetation is open pine forest grading uphill into mountain birch (Betula pubescens ssp. tortuosa) woodland. The tree line (birch) is at 300 to 400 m. The site is a few kilometres inside the Main Sub-stage (Younger Dryas) end-moraines, and it is weIl above the local marine limit (70-80 m.

popup_rows.value: The lake is situated on a bedrock hill in the Alta valley sorne 10 km inland from the fiord head.
